case_title: KENDRICK HUEY VS. EVAN CHRISTOPHER MENKE ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUEY, KENDRICK ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-04-2021 VACATED. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON 6/30/21. (206)
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-14-2020 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF KENDRICK HUEY'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. ALEX LEMBERG, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO JURY FEES AND FEES FOR A PEACE OFFICER TO TESTIFY IN COURT. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT.
